columns.extraction_plan: The specific outcome measure "Time To Progression of Serum Androgen" (TTPSA) is not reported in the PDF. The document reports "Progression-free survival" (PFS) which is a broader composite endpoint that includes PSA progression, but also radiological or clinical progression. A value specifically for "Time To Progression of Serum Androgen" is not provided for the treatment arm (SOC + AAP).

The specific outcome measure "Time To Progression of Serum Androgen" (TTPSA) is not reported in the PDF. The document reports "Progression-free survival" (PFS) which is a broader composite endpoint that includes PSA progression, but also radiological or clinical progression. A value specifically for "Time To Progression of Serum Androgen" is not provided for the control arm (SOC-alone).
